title: chrysothamnus occidentalis
intro: Chrysothamnus occidentalis, also known as the narrowleaf goldenrod, is a flowering plant native to the western regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing the risk of certain cancers and improving respiratory health. Chrysothamnus occidentalis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various purposes.
